task.objective: Export test data to CSV for offline analysis and reporting.

goals.goal: Support filtering by date range and status

success_criteria.criterion: CSV downloads work for executions, results, and flakiness
CSV opens correctly in Excel/Google Sheets

database_changes.note: No database migrations required - uses existing data

endpoint.description: Export flaky test analysis to CSV

sample_output.test_results_csv: ID,Test Name,Test File,Status,Duration (ms),Is Flaky,Error Message,Branch 1,should login,tests/auth.spec.ts,passed,1500,false,,main 2,should checkout,tests/cart.spec.ts,failed,3000,false,Timeout exceeded,main

testing_checklist.item: CSV opens correctly in Excel/Google Sheets

rollback.note: No database changes to rollback. Remove created files.

next_phase.name: realtime_streaming
next_phase.description: Show live test results as they complete during execution
